title: Hollyone Hydrangea Artificial Flowers, 3PCS | 18.8" Fake Flowers Silk Hydrangeas with 6" Large Blooms, Realistic Cream White Faux Flowers for Floral Arrangements, Centerpieces, Wedding, Home Decor
features: Standing at 18.8 inches (48 cm) tall with a lush 6-inch (15.2 cm) bloom, they’re the perfect size for centerpieces, wall vases, or DIY wedding bouquets. Their lifelike look makes them blend seamlessly into any cozy corner.

The fake hydrangea’s graceful petals unfold with gentle gradient tones, creating a soft, cloud-like appearance. Every detail—from the realistic texture to the layered structure—mimics nature’s beauty, adding a fresh bloom to your living room or kitchen.

Crafted from premium silk, these hydrangea stems have a delicate yet durable feel. Their natural curves, bendable stems, and rich petal clusters brighten living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, and office desks effortlessly, offering a lively touch that lasts through all seasons.

With their dreamy gradient hues, these decorative artificial hydrangeas bring subtle elegance to every space. Whether in rustic homes or modern apartments, they fill the room with softness and natural beauty.

Ideal for creating floral arrangements, bridal bouquets, or festive table settings, these faux hydrangeas promise endless creativity. Their chic charm keeps your favorite spaces feeling fresh and inviting, without any maintenance.
description: These silk hydrangeas offer soft gradient tones and lush petals, ideal for brightening living rooms and kitchens. Crafted with delicate layers and rich textures, these flowers add a natural touch to bedrooms, baths, and entryways. At 18.8" tall, they’re perfect for DIY projects, wedding bouquets, or simply creating a cozy centerpiece at home. Subtle color blending and realistic petal shapes make these hydrangeas a beautiful fit for modern and rustic décor alike. From everyday arrangements to festive celebrations, these everlasting blooms bring graceful charm to any setting.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Realistic silk flowers with natural curves, weather resistant, comes in a pack of 3
